brief.para: Compare register with immediate and branch

authored.para: This instruction compares the value in a register with an immediate, and conditionally branches to a label at a PC-relative offset if the comparison is true. This instruction provides a hint that this is not a subroutine call or return. This instruction does not affect the condition flags.

alias_list.alias_list_intro: This instruction is used by the aliases

aliasref.hover: Compare signed greater than or equal to immediate and branch
Compare unsigned higher than or same as immediate and branch
Compare signed less than or equal to immediate and branch
Compare unsigned lower than or same as immediate and branch

alias_list_outro.text: below for details of when each alias is preferred.

a.hover: Is the 32-bit name of the general-purpose register to be tested, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is an unsigned immediate, in the range 0 to 63, encoded in the "imm6" field.
Is the program label to be conditionally branched to. Its offset from the address of this instruction, in the range -1024 to 1020, is encoded as "imm9" times 4.
Is the 32-bit name of the general-purpose register to be tested, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is an unsigned immediate, in the range 0 to 63, encoded in the "imm6" field.
Is the program label to be conditionally branched to. Its offset from the address of this instruction, in the range -1024 to 1020, is encoded as "imm9" times 4.
Is the 32-bit name of the general-purpose register to be tested, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is an unsigned immediate, in the range 0 to 63, encoded in the "imm6" field.
Is the program label to be conditionally branched to. Its offset from the address of this instruction, in the range -1024 to 1020, is encoded as "imm9" times 4.

ps.name: A64.control.compbranch_imm.CBGT_32_imm

explanation.enclist: CBGT_32_imm, CBLT_32_imm, CBHI_32_imm, CBLO_32_imm, CBEQ_32_imm, CBNE_32_imm

intro.para: Is the 32-bit name of the general-purpose register to be tested, encoded in the "Rt" field.

explanation.enclist: CBGT_32_imm, CBLT_32_imm, CBHI_32_imm, CBLO_32_imm, CBEQ_32_imm, CBNE_32_imm, CBGT_64_imm, CBLT_64_imm, CBHI_64_imm, CBLO_64_imm, CBEQ_64_imm, CBNE_64_imm

intro.para: Is an unsigned immediate, in the range 0 to 63, encoded in the "imm6" field.

intro.para: Is the program label to be conditionally branched to. Its offset from the address of this instruction, in the range -1024 to 1020, is encoded as "imm9" times 4.

intro.para: Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose register to be tested, encoded in the "Rt" field.

ps.name: A64.control.compbranch_imm.CBGT_32_imm
